hint: Paste a User Access Token from the Hub. It is stored encrypted on this device only.

hubSession.hint: Sign in to the Hub in a login window to unlock likes, post reactions and comments, watching, and discussion reactions — actions the Hub blocks for access tokens. The session cookie is stored encrypted on this device only.
hubSession.invalid: The Hub rejected the captured session. Try connecting again.
hubSession.mismatch: That Hub login belongs to a different account than this token session. Sign in to the Hub with the same account.
hubSession.network: Couldn't reach the Hub to verify the session. Check your connection and try again.
hubSession.timeout: The login window timed out. Try connecting again.
hubSession.title: Hub web session
hubSession.forbidden: Hugging Face blocked the request (403). Check your network, proxy, or region and try again.

missingWriteScope: Your access token is missing the "write-discussions" permission, so this action isn't available.

tokenSignIn.createLink: Create a token on the Hub
tokenSignIn.hint: Use a write or fine-grained token with the permissions you need. A token can also read your Hub notification inbox.
tokenSignIn.invalid: The Hub rejected this token. Check that it was copied fully and hasn't been revoked.
tokenSignIn.label: User Access Token
tokenSignIn.network: Couldn't reach the Hub to verify the token. Check your connection and try again.
tokenSignIn.forbidden: Hugging Face blocked the request (403). Check your network, proxy, or region and try again.
